mapper.select: SELECT up.id, up.user_id, up.content, up.created_at FROM user_posts up WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_behaviors ub WHERE ub.target_type = 'post' AND ub.target_id = CAST(up.id AS CHAR) ) ORDER BY up.created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, user_id, content, created_at FROM user_posts WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM audit_records ar WHERE ar.content_id = CONCAT('post_', user_posts.id) ) ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_posts SET status = #{status}, audit_by = #{auditBy}, audit_time = NOW(), reject_reason = #{rejectReason} WHERE id = #{id}
